name: Assistant Operator
description: A gentle starting path for everyday chat, reminders, automations, and control-room visibility.
starter_prompt: Show me the best way to organize my next tasks, reminders, and follow-up work inside Somi
guide_steps: Begin in chat with a natural request instead of memorizing commands.
Use the Control Room to inspect open work, automations, and memory when you want more visibility.
Promote repeated routines into automations once the flow feels right.
quick_actions: Create an automation after the task repeats
